import csv, os

for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base):

# Show header + first few rows of 4 diverse datasets
for p in [paths[0], paths[10], paths[20], paths[35]]:
    with open(p) as f:
        reader = csv.reader(f, delimiter='\t')
        header = next(reader)
        rows = list(reader)
    print('File:', p.split('non-inhibited/')[-1])
    print('  Cols:', header)
    print('  Rows:', len(rows))
    print('  First row:', rows[0])
    print('  Last row:', rows[-1])
